title: The Shimmering Mirage
lines: The sand beneath your feet has lost its warmth, turning into a fine, white powder that feels like ground bone. It doesn't crunch; it whispers.

Floating above the shimmering horizon is an impossible fortress—a palace constructed from moonlight, prisms, and shadows that shouldn't exist. Its towers spiral toward the bruised-purple clouds like frozen black lightning.
It is a monument to a geometry that defies the laws of man, yet its beauty is as intoxicating as a deadly poison.

options.desc: 1. Approach the shimmering gates of the moon-glass palace
2. Stare into the geometric patterns of the walls
3. Ignore the palace and head toward the nearby green basin
4. Resist the mirage and head back toward the dunes
